whats_new:
• EEPROM Flashing: Added full support for writing to EEPROM, allowing users to store and manage persistent data directly on their Arduino boards.
 •Undo/Redo Fix: Significantly improved the Undo/Redo engine in the code editor for a more reliable and bug-free experience.
 •Stability (USB Fix): Resolved critical ANR (App Not Responding) issues that occurred during sudden USB cable disconnections.
